channel.title: Query params in url doesn't work
channel.description:
Hi, Whenever I want to share my website on facebook for example, it provides custom params and for some reason it'll then fetch the wp homepage but I want it to fetch my statically made homepage. The site and everything works whenever I just put in the url but with custom params it doesn't. Does anyone know how I can fix this?
Thanks in advance!

item.title: Query params in url doesn't work
item.dc:creator: tieshoenderdos
item.description:
Hi, Whenever I want to share my website on facebook for example, it provides custom params and for some reason it’ll then fetch the wp homepage but I want it to fetch my statically made homepage. The site and everything works whenever I just put in the url but with custom params it doesn’t. Does anyone know how I can fix this?

Thanks in advance!

Read full topic
item.source: Query params in url doesn't work
